en-US.title: Fairway Fantasy
en-US.subtitle: Fantasy Golf with Friends
en-US.description:
Fairway Fantasy is the ultimate fantasy golf experience. Build your league, draft real PGA golfers, set weekly lineups, and compete head-to-head with friends all season long.

Create & Join Leagues
Start your own fantasy golf league or join one with an invite code. Choose between Draft leagues for tournament-style play or Season leagues for a full-season experience.

Live Draft Room
Draft your squad in real time with friends. Our live draft room keeps everyone in sync with real-time picks, player stats, and countdown timers.

Manage Your Roster
Set your weekly lineup, pick up free agents, and propose trades to stay competitive. Every roster move matters when you're chasing the top of the standings.

Real PGA Tournament Data
Live leaderboards, player stats, and scoring powered by professional golf data. Watch your fantasy squad perform in real tournaments as they happen.

Season-Long Competition
Track standings, weekly scores, and head-to-head matchups throughout the entire golf season. See who really knows golf.
en-US.keywords: fantasy golf,fantasy sports,PGA,golf league,draft,fantasy league,golf pool,friends,competition,roster
en-US.promotionalText: Create leagues, draft golfers, and compete with friends in fantasy golf.

reviewDetails.notes: This is a free fantasy sports app. No real money, gambling, or in-app purchases. Users create leagues with friends and compete based on real PGA tournament results. Requires account creation (email + username). Backend API hosted on Render.
